title: Normalize tracked snapshot, protected publication, and shared/runtime serialization to repo-relative paths
summary: Remove absolute path leakage from tracked `.prism/state/**`, protected publication flows, shared journals, and repo-published change snapshots, using anchors as the primary reference and repo-relative paths only as the fallback file-level reference.

acceptance.label: Tracked snapshot shards and manifests contain no absolute filesystem paths
Shared/runtime records intended to survive across worktrees or clones do not persist absolute filesystem paths
Change snapshots and outcome metadata use anchors plus repo-relative file references instead of absolute file paths
